files.runtime_impact: PRIMARY SURFACE-010 TRIGGER — init_engine performs startup DB writes
Read + Write to DB (model definition only at import)
Provides Base class for all ORM models

files.note: Required so create_all discovers all tables

core_functions.fn: init_engine(backend: str, url: str, echo: bool, pool_size: int, sqlite_dir: str)
core_functions.contract: Creates AsyncEngine + async_sessionmaker; performs backend-specific setup; runs create_all

backend_handling.memory: Returns immediately — no engine, no factory
backend_handling.sqlite: Creates directory, engine, WAL PRAGMAs per-connection, create_all
backend_handling.postgres: Creates engine, checks asyncpg, create_all (with auto-create DB retry)

core_functions.contract: Convenience wrapper — extracts backend/url/pool_size from config object
Returns None if backend=memory, else returns the sessionmaker
Returns None if not initialized or backend=memory

global_state.note: Module-level globals; close_engine resets to None

cand009_engine_implementation_contract.pragma_mechanism: event.listens_for(_engine.sync_engine, 'connect') — runs on every new connection

table_args: Index('idx_users_oauth_identity', oauth_provider, oauth_id, unique=True, sqlite_where=oauth_provider IS NOT NULL AND oauth_id IS NOT NULL)
used_by: app.py _ensure_admin_user() — queries for admin user row
cand024_userrow_model_contract.model_purpose: User identity and auth metadata persistence

database_backend_memory_noop_contract.description: When backend=memory, init_engine returns early with no engine created

init_engine_behavior.step_2: logger.info('Persistence backend=memory -- ORM engine not initialized')
init_engine_behavior.step_3: return (no engine created, no session_factory, no DB operation)

repository_contracts.RunRepository: Must check: if sf is None: use MemoryRunStore()
repository_contracts.FeedbackRepository: Must check: if sf is None: use no-op or in-memory
repository_contracts.ThreadMetaStore: Must check: if sf is None: use in-memory

get_session_factory_none_fallback_contra.description: Repositories and gateway must handle None from get_session_factory()

usage_in_deps_py.pattern: sf = get_session_factory(); if sf is not None: create SQL repos; else: create MemoryRunStore()

usage_in_app_py.pattern: sf = get_session_factory(); if sf is None: return (skip admin check)

sqlite_startup_write_safety_plan.description: SQLite backend init_engine startup write sequence

writes_per_connection.purpose: Write-Ahead Logging — concurrent reads + writers without blocking
writes_per_connection.safety: non-destructive; WAL file created if not exists

writes_per_connection.purpose: Periodic fsync only at checkpoint boundaries — fast + safe
writes_per_connection.safety: no data loss risk with UPSERT patterns

sqlite_startup_write_safety_plan.pragma_mechanism: event.listens_for(_engine.sync_engine, 'connect') — attaches to every new connection
sqlite_startup_write_safety_plan.directory_creation: os.makedirs(sqlite_dir, exist_ok=True) — only creates dir, not files

create_all_safety.idempotent: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS — safe to run on already-existing tables
create_all_safety.not_destructive: Does not DROP or ALTER existing tables

rollback_on_failure.scenario: create_all fails (e.g., existing table with incompatible schema)
rollback_on_failure.action: Exception propagates; engine still created but tables incomplete

postgres_create_database_safety_plan.trigger_condition: backend=postgres AND database does not exist
sequence: 1. Create engine to 'postgres' maintenance DB (AUTOCOMMIT isolation)
postgres_create_database_safety_plan.maintenance_db: postgres (default admin DB on every Postgres server)
postgres_create_database_safety_plan.isolation_level: AUTOCOMMIT — required because CREATE DATABASE cannot run in transaction

failure_modes.action: Exception propagates; gateway fails to start
failure_modes.recovery: Grant CREATEDB privilege to user, or pre-create database manually

failure_modes.action: CREATE DATABASE fails with 'already exists' — caught and re-raised as the original create_all error
failure_modes.note: Original error re-raised because retry would infinite loop

rollback_on_failure.scenario: CREATE DATABASE succeeds but subsequent create_all fails
rollback_on_failure.action: Database exists but empty; manual cleanup required

schema_create_all_safety_plan.operation: async with _engine.begin() as conn: await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)

idempotent_check.operation: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS (SQLAlchemy default)
idempotent_check.safety: Safe to call on already-initialized database

not_destructive.does_not: DROP tables, ALTER columns, migrate data
not_destructive.only_does: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for each Base.metadata registry

model_discovery.purpose: All ORM models must be imported so Base.metadata discovers them

failure_handling.postgres_specific: if 'does not exist' in str(exc): auto-create DB, retry

no_schema_drift.note: create_all is for dev convenience; production should use Alembic
no_schema_drift.alembic_alternative: Alembic for schema migrations, create_all only in dev/test

close_engine_cleanup_contract.description: close_engine() must properly dispose of engine and release all connections
contract: 2. await _engine.dispose() — release all connection pool connections

no_op_when_uninitialized.scenario: close_engine called when _engine=None (e.g., memory backend or not yet initialized)

close_engine_cleanup_contract.connection_release_guarantee: dispose() closes all pooled connections; no lingering connections after close

connection_pool_lifecycle_contract.description: Connection pool must be properly sized and managed

pool_pre_ping.purpose: Test connection validity before use; recycle stale connections
pool_pre_ping.effect: Slight latency overhead but prevents 'connection dead' errors

pool_exhaustion_handling.symptom: All connections in use; new request blocks/waits

SDB-01.name: memory backend no-op
SDB-01.tests: init_engine(backend='memory') returns early; get_session_factory() returns None

SDB-02.name: sqlite directory creation
SDB-02.tests: sqlite_dir created if not exists; engine created with url

SDB-06.name: postgres database auto-create
SDB-06.tests: Non-existent DB created automatically; create_all succeeds

SDB-07.name: schema create_all runs
SDB-07.tests: All 5 tables exist after init_engine completes

SDB-08.name: close_engine cleanup
SDB-08.tests: After close_engine, engine is None, factory is None

SDB-09.name: graceful degradation on failure
SDB-09.tests: If create_all fails, appropriate error logged; no crash

POOL-04.name: Pool recycle on error
POOL-04.tests: Stale connection recycled; subsequent requests succeed

rollback_procedure: 3. init_engine returns early, no engine created
5. Existing SQLite/Postgres data preserved on disk
rollback_disable_switch_mapping.no_data_loss: memory fallback does not delete SQLite/Postgres files

sequence.reason: Foundation — Base class required for all ORM models
Model registration — imports all models for Base.metadata discovery
Aggregate exports — re-exports init_engine, close_engine, get_session_factory

implementation_order_if_authorization_gr.parallelization_possible: Step 1 and Step 2 can run in parallel (Base and UserRow independent)
implementation_order_if_authorization_gr.critical_path: Step 4 (engine.py) is the primary trigger and must be last in this sequence

stop_conditions.action: Do not implement Stage 3 — engine.py triggers SURFACE-010

stop_conditions.condition: Authorization scope does not expand to allow persistence/ directory
